title: Pamela Daily
compiled_truth: Pamela Daily is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-21 to 2002-05-06), Pamela Daily sent 18 and received 84 emails, totalling 102 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (12), [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (4), [Julie Armstrong](people/julie-armstrong) (3), [Joan Lipuscek](people/joan-lipuscek) (2), [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (1). Mailbox folders observed: action_items_in, deleted_items, inbox, projects.
